# How to File Bankruptcy - Bankruptcy Law Guide, Chapter 7 & 13 [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Free how to file bankruptcy guide for 2026. Bankruptcy law explained: Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, exemptions, filing costs, means test, and ste...

## About
howtofilebankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.
